She wears layered black leather armor beneath a flowing midnight cloak trimmed with thick silver-gray fur, intricate engraved metal details, weathered belts, armored gauntlets, and tall battle-worn boots. Behind her stands a majestic glowing white stag with massive luminous antlers and ethereal pale-blue eyes, appearing ancient, sacred, and spirit-like. The stag radiates soft moonlight against the dark snowy landscape.
